name: Dr Aisha Patel
title: Registered Dietitian & Nutritionist
bio: Dr Aisha Patel is a registered dietitian with over 10 years of clinical experience in NHS and private settings. She specialises in weight management, diabetes nutrition and digestive health.
bullets: HCPC Registered Dietitian|MSc Nutritional Medicine|NHS & private practice

name: Dr Marcus Webb
title: Consultant in Sport & Exercise Medicine
bio: Dr Marcus Webb is a GMC-registered doctor specialising in exercise medicine. He helps patients from elite athletes to complete beginners achieve their fitness goals safely.
bullets: GMC Registered Doctor|FSEM (Fellow Sport & Exercise Medicine)|Former Olympic team doctor

name: Dr Sarah Okonkwo
title: Clinical Psychologist
bio: Dr Okonkwo is a BACP-accredited clinical psychologist with expertise in anxiety, depression and stress management. She combines CBT with mindfulness-based approaches.
bullets: BACP Accredited Psychologist|CBT & Mindfulness specialist|NHS & private practice

name: Dr Neil Fraser
title: Endocrinologist & Diabetes Specialist
bio: Dr Fraser is a consultant endocrinologist with a particular focus on type 2 diabetes prevention and management. He has published widely on lifestyle interventions for metabolic conditions.
bullets: GMC Registered Consultant|Type 2 diabetes specialist|Published researcher
